tasks.title: After `agt run` creates task issues, the parent (approval) issue body gains a `## Tasks` checklist with each task title and `(#N)` issue reference
tasks.lastReason: Iteration escalation: same compound-gate layer recurred across multiple iterations

tasks.title: When a task gate passes, its checklist line updates from `- [ ]` to `- [x]`
tasks.lastReason: Iteration escalation: same compound-gate layer recurred across multiple iterations

tasks.title: When a task hits max review rounds (escalated), its checklist line shows the `⚠️ blocked` marker
Each task issue body contains `Part of #N` linking back to the parent approval issue
`agt finalize` closes the parent approval issue (confirm this already works or fix it)
No extra project board columns or config changes are required — existing status flow is sufficient
All existing tests still pass after changes to `run.mjs` and `finalize.mjs`
